Age.description: Age groups of females in England and Wales, used to illustrate how the age structure of the population affects the overall death rate.

Death_rate_1931_5.description: Annual death rates per 1000 females in 1931-5 for each age group and all ages combined. Compared with 1983 rates to show age-specific declines counterbalanced by changed age structure.

Death_rate_1983.description: Annual death rates per 1000 females in 1983 for each age group and all ages combined. Compared with 1931-5 rates to show age-specific declines counterbalanced by changed age structure.
